entryCriteria.formula: OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=0),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=500),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c,CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c,CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=1000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head - USA')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c,CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c,CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA Sr Professional - USA')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=10000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=2500&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'CRM')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA RO / Manager (USA)')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=25000),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c< 500&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(OR(CONTAINS (CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=500&&CC_CheckAmount__c<1000&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISBLANK( NAFTA_RecallAmount__c )&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&ISBLANK( NAFTA_RecallAmount__c )&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=500&&CC_CheckAmount__c<5000&&(ISPICKVAL(CC_CheckCategory__c,'Recall'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=500&&CC_CheckAmount__c<1500&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=NAFTA_RecallAmount__c&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false),(OR(CONTAINS (CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=500&&CC_CheckAmount__c<1500&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=1500&&CC_CheckAmount__c<2500&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=2500&&CC_CheckAmount__c<5000&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')))

OR((OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=1000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=5000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head - USA')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=10000),(OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA Sr Professional - USA')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=10000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=5000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'CRM')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=5000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA RO / Manager (USA)')&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=25000),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c < 500&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(OR(CONTAINS (CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=1000&&ISBLANK( NAFTA_RecallAmount__c )&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==false),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&ISBLANK( NAFTA_RecallAmount__c )&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=500&&CC_CheckAmount__c <5000&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(OR(CONTAINS (CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=500&&CC_CheckAmount__c <1500&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=1500&&CC_CheckAmount__c<2500&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&CC_CNAUpdate__c==true),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=2500&&CC_CheckAmount__c <5000&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=5000&&CC_IsRecallApproval__c&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')),(OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Advisor' ),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Level3 Agent'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA Sr Professional - USA'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'FCA RO / Manager (USA)'))&&CC_CheckAmount__c >=25000&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')))

OR( (OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && !CC_IsRecallApproval__c && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Operation Head - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000), (OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c == true), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Area Manager') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Supervisor'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Operation Head'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'FCA Sr Professional - USA') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 25000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') ) )

OR( (OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && !CC_IsRecallApproval__c && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000), (OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c == true), (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') && CC_IsRecallApproval__c ), (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Supervisor'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Operation Head') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 25000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') ) )

OR( (OR(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist'),CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && !CC_IsRecallApproval__c && CC_CNAUpdate__c == false && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000), (OR((CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Advisor')&&!CC_IsRecallApproval__c), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor')) && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 10000 && CC_CNAUpdate__c == true), (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist')) && CC_IsRecallApproval__c && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') ), (OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Supervisor') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 25000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted') ) )

OR( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Advisor' ), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Specialist'), CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') ) && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 25000 && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c, 'Submitted')

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CNAUpdate__c == true && CC_CheckAmount__c < 1000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 1000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Top Care Agent - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Junior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c <5000),(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Senior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c < 5000) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Top Care Agent - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Junior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Senior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Level3 Agent') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Top Care Agent - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Junior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name, 'Social Media Agent Senior - USA') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_CheckAmount__c >= 5000) )

ApprovalProcess.description: NAFTA-4 CC-544 Revised approval process for check request for USA users.
ApprovalProcess.label: Check Request Approval Process USA
